S.FORM: == Cliff Alexander == Cliff Alexander unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. 11 bulad 16 demiad, 1995 a mihca, Cliff Alexander, miunduay. Cliff Alexander nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois. kakuniza
S.PHON: == ¶r~…æiff ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr == ¶r~…æiff ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. ** bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶r~…æiff ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr, miunduaj. ¶r~…æiff ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ¶ƒßi ¶ago, ir~…ær~…æinois. kakuniza
S.FORM: == Cliff Alexander == Cliff Alexander unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. 11 bulad 16 demiad, 1995 a mihca, Cliff Alexander, miunduay. Cliff Alexander nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois. kakuniza
